name: Colorectal Cancer Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for malignant neoplasms of the colon, rectum, and anus. Used as an exclusion in the colorectal cancer screening (COL) measure and for identifying members with active colorectal malignancies.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Malignant neoplasm of overlapping sites of colon
Malignant neoplasm of overlapping sites of rectum, anus and anal canal
Personal history of other malignant neoplasm of large intestine
Personal history of other malignant neoplasm of rectum, rectosigmoid junction, and anus
